title: lithocarpus crassinervius
intro: Lithocarpus crassinervius, also known as the Taiwan chinquapin, is a species of tree in the beech family Fagaceae. It is native to Taiwan and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus crassinervius include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the leaves and bark of the plant are used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
